ddl.value: CASE WHEN "type" = 'text' THEN "text_text" IS NOT NULL ELSE TRUE END
ddl.name: text_text_required_if_type_is_text

ddl.value: CASE WHEN "type" = 'reasoning' THEN "reasoning_text" IS NOT NULL ELSE TRUE END
ddl.name: reasoning_text_required_if_type_is_reasoning

ddl.value: CASE WHEN "type" = 'file' THEN "file_media_type" IS NOT NULL AND "file_url" IS NOT NULL ELSE TRUE END
ddl.name: file_fields_required_if_type_is_file

ddl.value: CASE WHEN "type" = 'source_url' THEN "source_url_source_id" IS NOT NULL AND "source_url_url" IS NOT NULL ELSE TRUE END
ddl.name: source_url_fields_required_if_type_is_source_url

ddl.value: CASE WHEN "type" = 'source_document' THEN "source_document_source_id" IS NOT NULL AND "source_document_media_type" IS NOT NULL AND "source_document_title" IS NOT NULL ELSE TRUE END
ddl.name: source_document_fields_required_if_type_is_source_document
